final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style news/editorial photograph for a 微博 trending post, wide horizontal format.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide horizontal with generous negative space for text overlay; city skyline as primary horizontal sweep
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with neon lights beginning to glow, hurrying pedestrians in foreground, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset light
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban street-level scene at golden hour / dusk, with dramatic light-shadow contrast
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic dusk atmosphere — warm sunset glow on buildings, neon lights emerging, high contrast between light and shadow — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-to-neon direction — sunset amber against emerging city neon — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution documentary texture — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary headline, bold modern typeface, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio strictly; must feel like a real on-scene capture with cinematic impact
Avoid: overly staged or artificial-looking compositions; flat lighting; cluttered layout that obscures text areas
